feed.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

entry.title: [ERI1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack E101E10 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Apr 9, 07:00 - 10:00 UTC

Mar 3, 19:10 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our dedicated servers offer.

Start time : 09/04/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 09/04/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers will be unavailable during the maintenance for 90 minutes each.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy for our infrastructure, we will be relocating the servers currently located in rack E101E10 to rack ERI0102D01A.

Thank you for your understanding.

End time : 20/03/2026 03:00 UTC
Service impact : Public network will be temporarily unavailable during the maintenance for servers in L102A11.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on a network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

Feb 24, 15:40 UTC

We will be migrating Rack 24C20 to 24C19.

entry.title: [BHS7][Dedicated Servers] - Rooms B702/B703/B707/B709 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Mar 10, 10:00 - 20:00 UTC

Jan 13, 21:42 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 10/03/2026 10:00 UTC
End time : 10/03/2026 20:00 UTC
Service impact : Some servers located in rooms B702, B703, B707 and B709 might be temporarily unavailable from 10:30 UTC during the maintenance .
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Rooms G107 / G108 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Mar 9, 23:30 UTC  -  Mar 10, 02:30 UTC

Feb 24, 21:41 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our network infrastructure.

Start time : 09/03/2026 23:30 UTC
End time : 10/03/2026 02:30 UTC
Service impact : The private network (vRack) will be temporarily unavailable for approximately 30 minutes for the servers located in the racks listed below :

G108A04
G108A03
G107A14
G107A13
G107A15
G107A12
G107A11
G107A09
G107B15
G122B13
G107B14
G107A04
G107A05
G107B07
G107B04
G107B11
G107A08
G107B08

Please note that the maintenance may take less time than expected.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [BHS1][Cooling System] - Rack T02B72 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Mar 9, 11:00 - 19:00 UTC

Mar 3, 09:38 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure in rack T02B72.

Start time : 09/03/2026 11:00 UTC
End time : 09/03/2026 19:00 UTC

Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [LIM1][Cooling System] - L121B07 Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Mar 4, 12:00 - 14:00 UTC

Mar 3, 10:33 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure on L121B07.
Start time : 04/03/2026 12:00 UTC
End time : 04/03/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.
